faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Rutherford, NJ?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Rutherford typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand exactly what your investment covers.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Rutherford primarily deals with subterranean termites, which are the most destructive species in New Jersey. These termites build colonies in soil and access homes through cracks in foundations, making Rutherford's older homes particularly vulnerable. Our treatment plans specifically target these termite colonies at their source.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Rutherford homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Rutherford are completed within 4-8 hours depending on your home's size and treatment method chosen. Liquid barrier treatments can typically be done in one day, while bait station systems require initial installation followed by monitoring visits. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment warranties in Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on all termite treatments in Rutherford, typically ranging from 1-5 years depending on the service plan selected. Our warranties include annual inspections and re-treatment if termites return, giving you complete peace of mind and protecting your home investment.
